MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
T. Troy Otus, Esq. of the Otus Law Group, Tel. 650.548.2100, counsel for plaintiffs, and moving party, by court call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Counsel informed the court that his last communication with the plaintiffs occurred on 1/7/11 with Mr. Gaitan and 2/4/11 with Mr. Rebortura. He has not heard from either plaintiff since then. The complaint was filed on 12/22/11 only to preserve the statute of limitations. Therefore, for good cause shown and to the satisfaction of the court, T. TROY OTUS, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS WILBUR GAITAN and ROMMEL REBORTURA is granted. The court modified and signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
